style_summary: A glossy toy-advertising 3D style built from acid lime studio backdrops, oversized fuzzy plush mascots, chunky tech props, soft textile surfaces, translucent plastic accessories, checkerboard cards, sticker-like icons, hot-pink burst graphics, and bright commercial lighting.

environment_variables.SUBJECT: main plush mascot, fuzzy object, or toy-like character
environment_variables.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: chunky gadget, toy product, accessory, snack object, or display prop
environment_variables.LOCATION: minimal neon studio set, shelf, counter, or toy display environment
environment_variables.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: burst shapes, checkerboards, floating icons, stickers, soft blobs, secondary toy props, or graphic rays
environment_variables.MAIN_TEXT: short display-card headline or product-style word
environment_variables.SECONDARY_TEXT: tiny supporting copy on stickers, tags, labels, or cards
environment_variables.ACCENT_SYMBOL: small pop icon, spark, flower, checker tile, smile mark, or radiating doodle
environment_variables.WARDROBE_STYLE: surface styling, plush treatment, small accessories, straps, charms, or toy trims
environment_variables.STYLE_FIDELITY_ANCHORS: observable style traits that must remain visible
environment_variables.SOURCE_CONTENT_TO_AVOID: literal source content that generated samples must not recreate

style_fidelity_anchors: Acid lime or neon yellow-green studio background dominates the frame, with a soft gradient glow rather than realistic scenery.
A single oversized plush mascot or fuzzy toy object fills the lower center, cropped close enough to feel tactile and collectible.
Surfaces mix fuzzy knitted fabric, soft fleece, glossy molded plastic, translucent jelly material, chrome accents, and rubbery toy parts.
The main prop is a chunky toy-like gadget or product object sitting on or hugging the plush subject.
Palette uses electric lime as the base with cyan, sky blue, hot pink, lavender, yellow, white, chrome gray, and small black details.
Composition is dense but playful: big central toy mass, foreground shelf edge, floating side props, and graphic stickers arranged around it.
Graphic elements include hot-pink burst marks, checkerboard panels, lightning or starburst shapes, flower buttons, smiley icons, tags, and tiny labels.
Lighting is high-key commercial studio lighting with glossy highlights, soft bloom, gentle shadows, and polished 3D rendering.
Camera is close-up front three-quarter product view, slightly low or eye-level, making the toy object feel large and collectible.
Text appears as display-card lettering, sticker labels, hang tags, or tiny product microcopy, not as long paragraphs.
Mood is hyper-bright Y2K toy pop, cute tech accessory culture, tactile, premium, synthetic, and energetic.
Keep forms rounded, pillowy, inflated, and soft even when the subject is a gadget or product.
source_content_to_avoid: Do not recreate a green dragon, dinosaur, monster head, or the same blue snout with nostrils.
Do not place a camera on top of the subject or use a camera as the central product prop.
Do not copy the VIP card, the word VIP, membership wording, unlock/pro/features copy, or any close substitute.
Do not copy the same FILLTER tag, barcode spray can, flower button, pink basketball, exact checkerboard card, or the same object cluster.
Do not reuse the same face layout with two black oval eyes, yellow eye rings, green brows, and purple cord whiskers.
Do not use the same hot-pink lightning burst behind a camera card in the same position.
Do not include logos, watermarks, QR codes, creator marks, usernames, app marks, or brand identifiers.
Do not preserve the original story premise of a plush creature wearing a camera with a VIP subscription display.

visual_deconstruction.overall_style_category: hyper-saturated 3D toy product render, plush mascot advertising still, Y2K gadget-pop studio composition
visual_deconstruction.composition_and_layout: large plush subject fills the lower center on a clean shelf; a chunky prop sits above or against it; floating toy props and graphic burst marks orbit the subject; bright negative space remains in the neon background
visual_deconstruction.subject_placement: subject is cropped close at the bottom with oversized rounded features reaching toward the viewer; the prop often sits near the upper center and becomes the visual crown
visual_deconstruction.camera_angle_or_perspective: front-facing to three-quarter product photography angle, slightly low and close, with shallow spatial depth and soft commercial shadows
visual_deconstruction.typography_style: large simple display-card lettering, condensed product-card words, small tag microcopy, sticker labels, and tiny tech-card text
visual_deconstruction.color_palette_behavior: electric lime background acts as the base field; cyan and blue make soft plush counterforms; hot pink adds graphic shock accents; chrome gray and translucent plastic add gadget shine
visual_deconstruction.graphic_elements: checkerboard panels, pixel blocks, radiating doodle bursts, lightning/starburst silhouettes, charm tags, flower buttons, smiley balls, capsules, rings, cords, and floating jelly objects
visual_deconstruction.texture_and_finish: visible plush knit texture, fuzzy soft edges, glossy plastic reflections, jelly translucency, chrome highlights, subtle bloom, and clean high-resolution 3D polish
visual_deconstruction.lighting: bright high-key studio light with soft shadows under objects, specular highlights on plastic and chrome, gentle glow on neon colors
visual_deconstruction.mood: playful, tactile, collectible, synthetic, cute-tech, energetic, maximal but clean

primary_structure: Use a neon lime or yellow-green studio background with subtle glow and no detailed real-world scenery.
Place one oversized plush mascot or fuzzy toy object in the lower center as the main visual mass.
Add one chunky gadget or product prop above, in front of, or nestled into the plush subject.
Use a clean white or pale shelf edge along the bottom when the scene needs grounding.
Surround the subject with a few floating side props and toy accessories without making a realistic room.
Add hot-pink burst marks, checkerboard panels, sticker labels, or graphic rays behind or beside the prop.
Use cyan or blue plush counterforms against the lime base to keep the soft-toy color rhythm.
Keep the subject large and tactile, with foreground features or props pushing toward the viewer.
Balance maximal toy detail with clear central hierarchy: subject first, prop second, graphics third.
composition.vertical_9x16: Stack the product prop near the upper third and let the plush subject occupy the lower half to two-thirds, with floating accents in the open neon field.
composition.horizontal_16x9: Spread the plush subject across the lower center or lower right, place the prop as a central crown or side anchor, and let burst graphics and floating props fill the lateral space.

typography.headline: short display-card or sticker headline in bold simple block lettering, usually white, black, lime, or hot-pink against a dark or checkerboard insert
typography.secondary_text: tiny product microcopy on labels, tags, tabs, and stickers; it should remain decorative and sparse
typography.text_orientation: text can sit on a small screen, card, tag, sticker, capsule, or hanging label rather than directly on the background
typography.text_behavior: letters should feel like toy packaging or gadget UI graphics, crisp and integrated into 3D props; avoid paragraphs and brand marks

image_treatment.rendering_mode: high-resolution polished 3D product render with toy-advertising finish
image_treatment.surface_texture: plush knit fibers, fuzzy fleece, rubbery matte plastic, glossy molded plastic, translucent jelly props, and chrome highlights
image_treatment.lighting: high-key studio lighting, soft bloom, bright specular highlights, and clean grounding shadows
image_treatment.depth: shallow product-stage depth with close foreground scale; not flat vector and not photorealistic documentary
image_treatment.detail_density: medium-high toy detail around a clear central subject, with no realistic environmental clutter

design_rules: Style fidelity depends on acid lime background, plush/fuzzy main subject, toy gadget prop, bright Y2K graphics, and polished 3D lighting appearing together.
Use rounded, inflated, soft, collectible shapes even for gadgets and product props.
Keep the scene staged like a toy product still, not a real room or lifestyle photo.
Use hot pink and checkerboard accents as graphic shocks around the subject.
Include at least one tactile fabric surface and one glossy or translucent synthetic surface.
Make text part of a prop, screen, label, tag, or sticker rather than a plain poster caption.
Preserve close product-view scale and foreground shelf grounding when possible.
Change the character, prop, display text, and story premise completely from the source.
do: Use acid lime or neon yellow-green as the dominant background field.
Use oversized plush, fuzzy, knitted, or fleece surfaces with visible tactile texture.
Use chunky toy-like gadgets, translucent accessories, chrome rings, and rubber details.
Use hot-pink bursts, checkerboards, sticker icons, tags, charms, and graphic doodle marks.
Use high-key commercial studio lighting with soft bloom and glossy highlights.
Keep text short, punchy, and embedded into toy packaging or prop surfaces.
avoid: green dragon, dinosaur, monster head, blue snout with nostrils, camera-on-head, VIP display, membership card, FILLTER tag, barcode spray can, flower button, pink basketball, copied object cluster
watermark, username, creator ID, platform logo, QR code, signature, brand logo, app logo, real product logo
flat vector art, hand-drawn poster, realistic animal portrait, documentary photo, cinematic dark lighting, muted palette
detailed real room, natural landscape, busy retail shelf, long paragraphs of readable copy, corporate UI screens
sharp anatomical realism, hard mechanical sci-fi, gritty texture, horror mood, luxury minimalism
prompt_template: Create a {ASPECT_RATIO} finished raster image in the "Neon Plush Gadget Pop 3D Style". Subject: {SUBJECT}. Action: {SUBJECT_ACTION}. Prop/Product: {PRODUCT_OR_PROP}. Location: {LOCATION}. Background elements: {BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS}. Main text: {MAIN_TEXT}. Secondary text: {SECONDARY_TEXT}. Accent symbol: {ACCENT_SYMBOL}. Wardrobe/styling: {WARDROBE_STYLE}. Style fidelity anchors: {STYLE_FIDELITY_ANCHORS}. Source content to avoid: {SOURCE_CONTENT_TO_AVOID}. Apply these style rules: acid lime or neon yellow-green studio background, oversized fuzzy plush main subject, rounded inflated toy shapes, visible knit or fleece texture, chunky gadget or product prop, glossy molded plastic, translucent jelly details, chrome highlights, hot-pink burst graphics, checkerboard cards, sticker labels, tiny tags, playful Y2K icon grammar, foreground shelf edge when useful, high-key commercial studio lighting, soft bloom, polished 3D product-render finish, close front three-quarter product perspective, tactile collectible mood. Important content rule: preserve the style anchors first, then change the original content completely with new subject, prop, display text, colors within the palette, and story premise. Avoid: watermark, username, creator ID, platform logo, QR code, signature, brand mark, app mark, copied source text, VIP, membership card, camera-on-head, green dragon, dinosaur, monster head, blue snout, FILLTER tag, barcode spray can, copied flower button, copied pink basketball, exact checkerboard card, flat vector art, dark cinematic realism, natural landscape, detailed real room, long readable paragraphs, corporate interface.
negative_prompt: watermark, username, creator ID, platform logo, QR code, signature, brand logo, app mark, copied source text, VIP, membership card, unlock features text, camera on head, camera as central prop, green dragon, dinosaur, monster head, blue snout with nostrils, same black oval eyes with yellow rings, purple cord whiskers, FILLTER tag, barcode spray can, copied flower button, pink basketball, same object cluster, recognizable licensed character, identifiable person, flat vector illustration, hand-drawn poster, dark cinematic lighting, muted colors, photorealistic room, natural scenery, retail shelf clutter, long paragraphs, corporate UI, gritty realism, horror mood
